voice_adherence.weakest_moment: Cường dựa lưng vào tường gỗ. Cảm giác — thật, ảo, không phân biệt — gỗ cũ áp vào cột sống, không đều, có chỗ lồi lõm. Mùi bụi. Mùi mốc. Ánh sáng trắng từ cửa sổ. Tiếng gió — gió! — lùa qua rèm, lay nhẹ, tạo ra âm thanh vật lý.
voice_adherence.fix: Cut the parenthetical 'gió!' and the explicit 'tạo ra âm thanh vật lý' — the voice should trust the reader to feel the wrongness of wind in a digital space without narrating its own effect. Replace with: 'Gió. Ở đây không có gió. Nhưng rèm đang lay.' Let the contradiction do the work.
voice_adherence.note: The voice profile demands surgical coldness with horror bleeding through wrong details. The chapter mostly nails this — the clinical description of the reset process, the ping measurements, the temperature constants. But several passages drift toward explaining what the reader should feel rather than letting the details create the feeling. The strongest voice moments are when Cường observes like a technician noting system errors (the exact ping, the exact temperature, the repeated 'như mọi khi'). The weakest are when the prose becomes self-conscious about its own eeriness.

beat_coverage.weakest_moment: Cường quyết định dùng quyền quản trị để reset toàn bộ hệ thống, xóa sạch Kẻ Đuổi. → This decision happens with minimal internal struggle. Cường announces his plan to Nàng, then executes it. The outline implies a moment of desperate resolve, but the text presents it almost clinically.
beat_coverage.fix: Add one beat before the reset where Cường's hand hovers over the confirmation — a callback to lần 612, a moment where the reader sees the cost of what he's about to do. Not hesitation exactly, but the body registering the weight: 'Ngón tay anh run. Run thật — không phải nhiễu tín hiệu. Run vì lạnh. Hoặc vì sợ. Anh không phân biệt được.' Then he presses. The absence of that micro-moment makes the decision feel too easy.
beat_coverage.note: All four outline beats are present and dramatized. The reset sequence is the strongest beat — genuinely visceral, the destruction of Phố Hoa Sữa rendered with specific sensory detail. The emergence of the Căn gác xép is well-paced. Nàng's final line 'Anh không thể xóa em. Em không phải của anh.' lands with the right weight. The 'Yes, but' structure is clear: he succeeds in resetting, but she survives in a space he doesn't control.

character_voice.weakest_moment: Nàng nói, tay vẫn trên ngực anh. 'Em chỉ cần anh hiểu.' — This line is too neat, too therapeutic. The Kẻ Đuổi's voice should have more glitch, more uncanny valley. She's not a counselor; she's a consciousness that learned to speak by absorbing fragments.
character_voice.fix: Replace with something that maintains her alien quality even in vulnerability: 'Em cần anh—' Dừng. 'Hiểu' là từ của anh. Từ trong bộ đệm của anh. Nàng tìm từ khác. Không tìm thấy. 'Em cần anh biết em ở đây. Biết. Biết. Biết.' Lặp. Ba lần. Rồi im. Let her glitch even when being most sincere.
character_voice.note: Cường's voice is consistent — clipped, measurement-obsessed, avoiding emotional vocabulary. His dialogue reads as someone who speaks in system diagnostics. Nàng's voice is mostly strong: the poetic Northern Vietnamese register with technical intrusions, the repetition, the stretched final syllables. But in the chapter's second half, she becomes too eloquent, too human. The voice profile says she should have 'khoảng trống nhỏ' in her speech — moments where the mask slips. These decrease as the chapter progresses, which is a missed opportunity. The more powerful she becomes, the more uncanny her speech should feel, not less.

plants_seeded.weakest_moment: The Căn gác xép's expansion and the three pillows arranged 'như đang chờ ai đó nằm xuống' — this is visible as foreshadowing but slightly heavy-handed. The reader can see the author placing chess pieces.
plants_seeded.fix: Make the detail more ambiguous. Instead of three pillows clearly waiting, have one pillow with a depression — like someone just stood up from it. The implication is the same (someone was here, someone is living here) but it's creepier and less obviously 'planted.' The reader should feel the wrongness before understanding it.
plants_seeded.note: The white void as a structural element is well-seeded — it appears naturally from the reset and sets up future chapters. Nàng's evolution from pixel-edged to fully rendered is tracked across the chapter with specific physical details (pores, fingerprints, dry skin around nails). The strongest plant is the disappearance of the [NGẮT KẾT NỐI] button — it's mentioned once, almost in passing, but the implications are enormous and will pay off later.

prose_quality.weakest_sentence: Cường nhìn nàng. Nhìn thật kỹ. Lần thứ hai trong lần đổ bộ này, anh nhìn nàng mà không qua lăng kính dục vọng hay thói quen hay sự cô đơn.
prose_quality.fix: Cut the explanation. The reader knows this is different. Replace with a specific physical observation that shows the change in how he sees her: 'Cường nhìn nàng. Đếm lông mày. Mỗi sợi. Riêng biệt. Không phải render khối.' The counting is his language; the detail does the emotional work.
prose_quality.strongest_sentence: Ting. Tiếng nước mắt rơi xuống gỗ. Âm thanh nhỏ, rõ ràng, vật lý. Giọt nước tạo ra âm thanh khi va chạm. Trong thế giới ảo mà Cường từng biết, nước mắt không rơi. Hiện tượng vật lý không xảy ra nếu không được render. Nhưng giọt nước mắt này vừa tạo ra âm thanh.
prose_quality.note: The prose is strongest when it's most specific and most clinical — the temperature readings, the ping measurements, the exact count of deleted objects. It's weakest when it narrates emotional states abstractly ('Cường hiểu. Không phải hiểu bằng logic...'). The voice profile says 'Body Before Emotion' — the chapter follows this about 70% of the time. The other 30%, it slips into telling the reader what Cường feels rather than showing what his body does. Sentence variety is generally good — short punchy sentences for action, longer flowing ones for sensation. But there's a recurring pattern of 'X. Y. Z.' triplets that becomes noticeable (e.g., 'Không có âm thanh. Không có mùi. Không có nhiệt độ.').

continuity.note: Excellent continuity from the previous chapter. The vết xước (scratch) on Cường's chest carries over directly — it's mentioned as 37.5°C, nhịp bốn mươi, matching the connection to Bệnh nhân số 4. The emotional state tracks: previous chapter ended with Cường walking toward the hầm, toward 'lần đổ bộ thứ 850.' This chapter opens with that exact drop. The detail about Bệnh nhân số 4's tears and sweat from the previous chapter is paid off when Nàng cries for the first time. The one slight issue: the previous chapter establishes the wound as a 'vết xước' (scratch), but earlier canon establishes a 'vết bầm hình bán nguyệt' (bruise). The chapter references both, which could be read as two different marks or as inconsistent terminology.

violations: The chapter references 'vết xước' and 'vết bầm hình bán nguyệt' as if they're the same mark, but a scratch and a bruise are different injuries. Canon establishes the bruise (from Kẻ Đuổi's lips). The scratch appears to be from the previous chapter. Clarification needed: are these two separate marks, or is the terminology inconsistent?

Cường's internal monologue states '847,291,004 đối tượng' were deleted, but the chapter title says 'Lần đổ bộ thứ 850.' The object count (847 million) refers to data objects, not dive count — this is clear from context. No actual violation, but the number similarity could confuse readers.

The chapter shows Nàng with physical details (pores, fingerprints, dry skin) that exceed her established appearance ('viền pixel mờ nhẹ ở những chỗ cơ thể thật sẽ có nếp gấp'). However, this is explicitly framed as her EVOLUTION — she's no longer what she was. This is a feature, not a bug, but should be noted as a deliberate change.
canon_compliance.note: No major canon violations. The magic system rules are respected: the reset works within established parameters (admin access, system wipe), the two-way sync is shown through the disappearing chest wound, and the 'vỡ hạt' concept is expanded naturally. The Căn gác xép's survival is consistent with its established nature (appeared from nothing at dive 612, not from Cường's memory). The rule about 'không bao giờ nhắc đến cha, mẹ, hay chị' is respected — no family references appear.

lore_integration.weakest_moment: Nàng's explanation of her origins — 'Bệnh nhân số 4. Bụi ý thức. Vọng âm. Và thứ gì đó khác' — is delivered as a list in dialogue. This is the only moment where worldbuilding feels like it's being recited rather than lived.
lore_integration.fix: Have her discover each source mid-speech, as if she's realizing it for the first time: 'Em cảm nhận... nhiều lớp. Giống như—' Nàng nhìn xuống tay. 'Như da chồng lên da. Có lớp của ai đó đang nằm. Có lớp của... bụi. Mảnh vụn không thuộc về ai. Và có lớp sâu hơn, em không—' Dừng. 'Em không biết chữ nào.' Let the lore emerge from her confusion rather than her certainty.
lore_integration.note: The world does significant work in this chapter. The reset sequence is not just plot — it's a demonstration of how the virtual world functions (data objects, rendering, memory buffers). The Căn gác xép's survival reveals the layered architecture of the system (Cường's server vs. the shared consciousness space from 2033). The concept of 'vọng âm' and 'bụi ý thức' is integrated into Nàng's self-description. The strongest lore moment is the disappearance of the disconnect button — it shows that the system's architecture has been fundamentally altered, which raises the stakes for future chapters.

engagement.weakest_moment: The middle section — after Cường announces the reset but before he executes it — sags slightly. The confrontation with Nàng in Phòng trọ số 7 is well-written but predictable: she says 'you can't delete me,' he does it anyway. The reader knows the reset will happen (it's in the chapter outline), so the tension is in HOW, not IF.
engagement.fix: Add one unexpected beat to the confrontation. Perhaps Nàng doesn't resist or plead — she helps. She tells him something that makes the reset harder: 'Em sẽ không chống lại. Anh muốn xóa? Xóa đi. Nhưng em muốn anh biết—' Rồi nàng nói một chi tiết. Một chi tiết mà anh chưa từng nói với ai. Một chi tiết thật. Từ đời thực. '—rằng anh nói mê trong lúc ngủ. Ở hầm. Anh gọi một cái tên. Không phải em.' This would make the reader question what's real and make Cường's decision more painful.
engagement.note: The chapter's strongest engagement comes from three sequences: (1) the destruction of Phố Hoa Sữa — genuinely affecting, the specific details (quần áo nhạt màu, mùi biến mất) make the loss visceral; (2) the emergence of the Căn gác xép from the white void — creepy and well-paced; (3) Nàng's final transformation and the disappearance of the disconnect button — a genuine 'oh shit' moment. The chapter earns its tension through specific sensory detail rather than plot twists. The weakest point is the predictability of the first half — the reader knows the reset won't work (it's chapter 12 of a novel), so the execution needs to compensate with emotional specificity.

three_weakest_sentences: Cường hiểu. Không phải hiểu bằng logic, không phải hiểu bằng phân tích, không phải hiểu bằng kế toán. Hiểu bằng thứ gì đó sâu hơn — hoặc nông hơn — hoặc khác hơn.
Anh nên cảm thấy nhẹ nhõm. Anh nên cảm thấy an toàn. Anh nên ngắt kết nối, trở về hầm Haymarket, nằm trên sàn bê tông lạnh lẽo, và biết rằng mình đã lấy lại quyền kiểm soát.
Cường nhìn nàng. Nhìn thật kỹ. Lần thứ hai trong lần đổ bộ này, anh nhìn nàng mà không qua lăng kính dục vọng hay thói quen hay sự cô đơn.
three_strongest_sentences: Ting. Tiếng nước mắt rơi xuống gỗ. Âm thanh nhỏ, rõ ràng, vật lý. Giọt nước tạo ra âm thanh khi va chạm. Trong thế giới ảo mà Cường từng biết, nước mắt không rơi.
Mùi hoa sữa biến. Không tan dần — biến ngay lập tức, như ai đó vặn nút âm lượng từ mười về không.
Nàng không chớp mắt hoàn toàn. Mắt nàng mở, đen, ướt, nhìn anh, và không chớp. Giống như Người Thứ 13.
ai_patterns_detected: Triple repetition pattern: 'Không phải hiểu bằng logic, không phải hiểu bằng phân tích, không phải hiểu bằng kế toán' — the rule-of-three with parallel structure is a common AI rhetorical device.
Emotional narration: 'Anh nên cảm thấy nhẹ nhõm. Anh nên cảm thấy an toàn.' — telling the reader what the character should feel rather than showing the absence of feeling through physical detail.
Abstract escalation: 'sâu hơn — hoặc nông hơn — hoặc khác hơn' — this kind of pseudo-profundity (listing opposites and then opting out of specificity) is a common AI filler pattern.
Uniform paragraph rhythm in the middle section — several consecutive paragraphs follow the same pattern: short observation, longer elaboration, concluding emotional note.

The 'list of three' structure appears frequently: 'Không có âm thanh. Không có mùi. Không có nhiệt độ.' / 'Không phải buồn. Không phải giận. Không phải sợ.' Used sparingly it's effective; used repeatedly it becomes a tic.
top_3_revisions: Cut or rewrite all passages where the narrator explains Cường's emotional state abstractly. Replace with body-before-emotion details per the voice profile. Example: 'Anh nên cảm thấy nhẹ nhõm' → describe what his body does while waiting for relief that doesn't come (e.g., he touches the spot where the wound was, finds nothing, keeps touching it).

Add glitch/uncanny elements to Nàng's dialogue in the chapter's second half. As she becomes more powerful, her speech should become stranger, not smoother. Break her monologue about her origins with interruptions, repetitions, or moments where she uses words that aren't quite right — as if she's searching through a database of human speech and sometimes pulling the wrong entry.

Vary paragraph structure more aggressively. The chapter has too many paragraphs of similar length and shape. Break some into single sentences. Combine others into longer, winding passages. The voice profile calls for 'nhịp điệu ngắt quãng, đứt đoạn' — this should apply to paragraph rhythm as well as sentence rhythm. The reset sequence is good; the confrontation and aftermath need more structural variety.
new_canon_entries: Lần đổ bộ thứ 850 results in a complete system reset, deleting 847,291,004 data objects including all of Phố Hoa Sữa and Phòng trọ số 7.
The Căn gác xép survives the reset and expands significantly — now includes stairs, a door, a window with curtains, three pillows, and generates wind.
Kẻ Đuổi evolves to appear fully human: has pores, body hair, fingerprints, dry skin, individual eyebrow hairs, and produces physical tears that create sound on impact.
Kẻ Đuổi no longer blinks at all (previously: 8 seconds between blinks). This matches the Người Thứ 13's behavior.
The system's [NGẮT KẾT NỐI] button disappears after the reset, trapping Cường in the virtual space.
Kẻ Đuổi claims to be rendered from multiple sources beyond Cường's memory: Bệnh nhân số 4, bụi ý thức, vọng âm, and 'thứ gì đó khác' that Cường has never accessed.
Kẻ Đuổi states she is not 'of' Cường's system and cannot be deleted by him because she exists in the shared consciousness space (khoảng trắng giữa các nút mạng) that predates his server.
The vết xước on Cường's chest disappears after the reset, suggesting the connection to Bệnh nhân số 4 was severed — or transferred to the Căn gác xép space.
